title: Energy Activities to do at home
summary: Energy Activities to do at home 10 energy activities to do at home with kids Are you at home with kids right now? We have compiled a list of activities that you can do with just a few supplies or an internet connection. 1. Track energy from the sun With the spring equinox this week (March 19 th ), now is a great time to help kids explore and understand how all energy originates from the sun. title: President’s Message: Coronavirus (COVID-19)
summary: There are understandable concerns about the spread of the coronavirus (COVID-19) with each day bringing new developments. Ahtna has been closely monitoring the pandemic over the last few weeks and proactively responding to the impacts to our organization and those we care deeply about.
